Champion Homes logo
Home Finder
Find a Home Find modern and affordable manufactured and modular homes from one of today’s most trusted home builders: Champion Homes.
Find a Community Whether you are a first-time homebuyer or an empty nester, manufactured home communities featuring Champion Homes have you covered, no matter your stage of life.
Find a Retailer You can rely on Champion Homes’ network of manufactured and modular home retailers to assist you find your dream home and guide you in the home buying process.
Manufactured Homes Manufactured and mobile homes feature high-level quality and craftsmanship at an affordable price for homebuyers.
Modular Homes Discover prefab modular homes and how you can play a part in the design of your next home.
Park Models & Cabins Wherever you want to go, our park model RVs feel like home with spacious, fully functional living spaces on wheels.
Accessory Dwelling Units Explore accessory dwelling units like in-law or granny suites, backyard studio home, vacation and long-term rentals and she-sheds.
Blog Explore our blog to find insight, tips, design, and housing solutions.
Homebuying Process Buying a manufactured home doesn't have to be complicated! We'll help make your new home buying experience enjoyable and as stress free as possible.
Guide to MH Communities Here's what you need to know to decide which manufactured home community is right for you.
Monthly Payment Calculator Empower yourself as a home shopper by being as informed as possible when making this significant decision.
FAQs Find answers to the most common questions about manufactured housing.
Terms & Definitions Discover common terms to guide you in the buying process and get your dream home.
Why Choose Us We offer smart, innovative, and trustworthy housing solutions designed with you in mind.

Our Brands Our family of brands delivers a wide range of high-quality, attractive, and affordable manufactured and modular products from single- and multi-section homes in many styles to park models and cabins.
Contact Us
